subject: [Contrib] Authorize choice of subcomponents
commit_message:
[Contrib] Authorize choice of subcomponents

Instead of forcing installation of all contrib components, make the
installation of these components enabled with a toggle, so each person
can choose to install a subset, all or none.

Issue-ID: OOM-2352
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ie112fe1f1864587b9ac69f18967a3c28d16bdbbe

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Guys,
I've moved AWX and Netbox from "charts" folder to "components" folder so we can enable or disable them by choice.
As both of them were added (I believe for AWX actually) for CDS, I think it's important that you know it.
By default, they still get deployed if contrib is enabled

Patch Set 1:

Good initiative
